description: The pharmacy and therapeutics committee is conducting a retrospective audit of volatile anesthetic agent usage. Using Vital Recorder and the recordings in C:\Users\Docker\Desktop\VitalRecorderData\ (0001.vital, 0002.vital, and 0003.vital), identify which cases include both inspired (INSP_SEVO) and expired (EXP_SEVO) sevoflurane channels. For each qualifying case, export the full vital signs dataset to a CSV file on the Desktop named case_XXXX_sevo.csv (replacing XXXX with the case number). Save an anesthetic inventory report to C:\Users\Docker\Desktop\anesthetic_inventory.txt documenting which cases contain sevoflurane monitoring, the track names available in each case, the recording duration of each case, and a brief note on the clinical significance of monitoring both inspired and expired sevoflurane concentrations. (Login: Windows Desktop user; no Vital Recorder login required).
